## Why It Works

This post is mostly about making people stop and think about the statement. By comparing a job to time being rented at a discount, you hit people where it hurts. By doing so, you generate a lot of engagement.

## Template

It becomes very attractive to [ASPIRATIONAL GOAL] when you realize [EYE-OPENING INSIGHT ABOUT CURRENT SITUATION].

## Example

It becomes very attractive to start your own coaching practice when you realize most "coaches" are just recycling generic advice they read online, leaving their clients stuck in the same rut.
